route_sections.label: shadcn-ui source mark and route headline
route_sections.launch_value: Shows the upstream UI source clearly before any gallery detail.

route_sections.label: DX-WWW conversion route switcher
route_sections.launch_value: Lets Zed and users jump between UI, database, and backend conversion proofs.

route_sections.label: Registry intake table
route_sections.launch_value: Maps real registry files into source-owned DX-WWW route rows.

route_sections.label: Dashboard block inventory
route_sections.launch_value: Preserves dashboard shell, sidebar, table, and command structure as route proof.

route_sections.label: Unsupported React preview boundary
route_sections.launch_value: Separates real source conversion from runtime behavior still owned by future DX-WWW widgets.

route_sections.label: Split source and docs panels
route_sections.launch_value: Keeps the route scannable in Zed Web Preview without nested decorative card spam.

responsive_constraints: Route header wraps navigation without hiding the source logo.
Source tables stay readable in the constrained preview column.
Runtime boundary panels remain below the primary source surface on narrow screens.
accessibility_notes: Route navigation uses a named aria-label.
Source logo has descriptive alt text.
Unsupported runtime notes are visible text, not hidden tooltips.

real: Registry, style, theme, and dashboard source paths are recorded.
Copied visual asset and MIT notice are preserved.
partial: Interactive React previews are represented structurally until DX-WWW owns equivalent widgets.
blocked: No package-manager registry generation or React preview runtime was executed.
